sourceTitle: HGSE AI Policy on Student Use of Generative AI in Academic Work
evidenceSnippetOriginal: For any permitted use of GenAI tools, you must acknowledge and document that use in your assignment submission by explaining what tool(s) you used, prompts you provided (if applicable), and how you integrated the output into your work. If you cite directly from the tool, use proper citation format to credit the source.
